topRules.message: This statement will not be executed conditionally; only the first statement will be. The rest will execute unconditionally.
Prefer `Number.isNaN` over `isNaN`.
Don't use a zero fraction in the number.
Extract this nested ternary operation into an independent statement.
Member 'config' is never reassigned; mark it as `readonly`.
Mark the props of the component as read-only.
Prefer `node:child_process` over `child_process`.
Use `export…from` to re-export `WorkOrderFilters`.
This assertion is unnecessary since it does not change the type of the expression.
Use `export…from` to re-export `adminPasswordChangeSchema`.
Handle this exception or don't catch it at all.
Refactor this function to reduce its Cognitive Complexity from 23 to the 15 allowed.
Do not call `Array#push()` multiple times.
Prefer using an optional chain expression instead, as it's more concise and easier to read.
Do not use Array index in keys
Unexpected negated condition.
Prefer `String#replaceAll()` over `String#replace()`.
Prefer `globalThis.window` over `window`.
Remove this useless assignment to variable "status".
Use '[[' instead of '[' for conditional tests. The '[[' construct is safer and more feature-rich.
Refactor this code to not use nested template literals.
Refactor this code to not nest functions more than 4 levels deep.
Prefer top-level await over an async function `getUpdateChecker` call.
Prefer `.at(…)` over `[….length - index]`.
Move this component definition out of the parent component and pass data as props.
Use `new Array()` instead of `Array()`.
Prefer `node:child_process` over `child_process`.
'@/components/fleet' imported multiple times.
A form label must be associated with a control.
Redirect this error message to stderr (>&2).
Prefer `Number.isFinite` over `isFinite`.
Use <input type="button">, <input type="image">, <input type="reset">, <input type="submit">, or <button> instead of the "button" role to ensure accessibility across all devices.
'unknown' overrides all other types in this union type.
Prefer `structuredClone(…)` over `JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(…))` to create a deep clone.
Prefer using nullish coalescing operator (`??=`) instead of an assignment expression, as it is simpler to read.
Replace this union type with a type alias.
`sids` should be a `Set`, and use `sids.has()` to check existence or non-existence.
Async function 'handleStaleSensorRecovery' has too many parameters (8). Maximum allowed is 7.
'value' may use Object's default stringification format ('[object Object]') when stringified.
Remove this unused import of 'post'.
Move this array "sort" operation to a separate statement or replace it with "toSorted".
Define a constant instead of duplicating this literal "Data Integrity" 3 times.
Use a "numpy.random.Generator" here instead of this legacy function.
Use the "RegExp.exec()" method instead.
Review this redundant assignment: "severity" already holds the assigned value along all execution paths.
Prefer `globalThis` over `self`.
The object passed as the value prop to the Context provider changes every render. To fix this consider wrapping it in a useMemo hook.
'(from: number, length?: number | undefined): string' is deprecated.
useState call is not destructured into value + setter pair
Provide multiple methods instead of using "checked" to determine which action to take.
